문맥: 
쯔양은 남영동 소소라면과 매운 닭꼬치를 먹으며 추운 날씨를 녹이기 위해 방문했습니다. 그녀는 다양한 닭꼬치와 여러 종류의 라면을 시도하며 맛과 매운맛을 평가했습니다. 특히 매운 가스 라면은 매우 매워서 혀가 얼얼해졌습니다. 따뜻한 음식이 추운 날씨에 중요하다고 강조하며 시청자들에게 맛있는 음식을 추천했습니다.

[00:00 ~ 00:50] (It became so cold outside these days...) It's much colder tomorrow
(Nothing can hurt me in bed...-HungryTzuyangReporter) The Cold Wave Alert would be expanded due to this
(Go away cold!)
(The ramyun that would warm me, who is chilled to the bone, and)
(glossy and juicy chicken skewers-!)
(Just a little amount for today...) It is Soso (small) Ramyun here so...
(I'll just eat a little bit to warm myself up...) I'll quickly start with chicken skewers
(After having chicken skewers to warm up the stomach)
(She's ready to dig into the ramyun...)
(What's up with the color...?!) Look at the color
(A secret weapon that makes)
(midwinter into midsummer!)
(When it's cold, 000 Ramen is the best...!) It got really hot! Just as soon as I had one bite

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양(Tzuyu)이 서울의 용산동 '소소 라면 치킨 skewers'라는 식당에 방문하여 추운 날씨를 녹이기 위해 따뜻한 라면과 치킨 skewers를 주문합니다. 그녀는 다양한 맛의 라면을 선택하는데, 매운 '테이 가스 라면', 계란과 떡 라면, 치즈 라면이 포함되어 있습니다. 또한, 치킨 skewers로는 소금구이, 심장(심장), 그리고 간(간)을 선택하여 총 35개의 skewers를 주문합니다. 이 장면은 추운 날씨에 따뜻한 음식을 먹으며 만족감을 느끼는 쯔양의 모습을 보여줍니다.

[00:50 ~ 01:41] (The one that would warm up my cold body...) But I had in mind a little bit of hot soup and chicken skewers!
So I came to a place where they sell ramyun and chicken skewers together
Already excited thinking of eating something warm!
Let's go!
('Soso Ramyun Chicken Skewers' in Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
(Scanning the menu right away) There are so many dishes! Tear gas ramyun? It's probably very spicy
(Scanning quite eagerly) The type of chicken skewers!
(Chicken skewers (1p) 3,000 won) There are mild, medium, spicy, and grilled with salt
(The heart (3p) 5,000 won, chicken gizzard (2p) 5,000 won) There's also the heart and chicken gizzards!
Today, as it's called Soso (small) Ramyun here...
I'll keep it simple! Three ramyuns!
And 30 chicken skewers?!
(Okay, that's small...) Hello!
Tear gas ramyun, egg and rice cake ramyun, cheese ramyun, please
(Mild, medium, spicy flavors and grilled with salt) And five of each chicken skewer, so 20 skewers!
And can I have 5 chicken hearts and 5 chicken gizzards?

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양(Tzuyu)이 서울 용산구의 '소소라면 치킨꼬치'라는 식당에서 매운 음식을 도전하는 장면입니다. 그녀는 '테어 가스 라면'을 레벨 1000으로 주문하며, 이 라면이 매우 매워서 색이 붉게 변했다고 설명합니다. 또한, 다양한 종류의 치킨 꼬치(소금구이, 심장, 간)와 함께 라면을 먹으며 매운 맛을 즐기는 모습을 보여줍니다. 쯔양은 매운 음식에 대한 두려움을 잠시 잊고, 도전 정신을 발휘해 음식을 맛보는 과정을 담고 있습니다.

[01:41 ~ 02:34] (Wait...Wait a minute...)
Tear gas ramyun is very spicy
And you can pick from level 30~100
How spicy is level 100...?
When comparing it with 70, it's not too much different for you to eat but
the soup is a little bit spicier
(She's not good with spicy food, but she gives a bold try...) Then I'll give level 100 a try...
(Finished ordering a small(?) amount!) I'll go prepare it for you
(This is the small amount I'll be eating today)
(Making it tasty with a smokey flavor)
(Glossy and fat chicken skewers!)
(Can't leave out the heart when talking about chicken skewers)
(Of course we should have chicken gizzards, famous for its texture!)
(Also the secret powder!)
(Thirty pieces! Three types of chicken skewers completed)
(The ramyun trio is about to come)

문맥: 쯔양(Tzuyu)이 '남영동 소소라면'에서 매운 닭꼬치(매운 닭 skewers)와 다양한 라면 종류를 시식하는 장면입니다. 특히, 그녀는 가장 매운 '테이 가스 라면'(Tear Gas Ramen)을 도전하며 강한 매운맛을 경험합니다. 매운 음식을 먹으면서 느끼는 열기와 함께 스트레스 해소 효과를 강조하며, 매운 음식에 대한 긍정적인 반응을 보입니다. 또한, 매운 맛을 중화시키기 위해 피클과 마요네즈를 활용하며, 닭꼬치와 라면의 조합에 만족감을 표현합니다.

[06:01 ~ 08:07] (Burning) It became really hot! Just as I had a bite

(Got rid of the stress!) It's really a spiciness that gets rid of the stress!
(Complimenting myself LOL) I already ate it all! Proud of myself
(Exploding with coolness...) I'm so cool!
I'm at my max! No more!
(Having pickled radish for emergency...) It's incredible!
Until the spiciness goes away,
I'll have chicken gizzards for now!

(Almost crying...)

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양(Tzuyu)이 서울 남영동 소재의 '남영치킨'을 방문한 경험을 회상하며, 해당 식당이 이전에 방문했을 때도 추천할 만한 곳이었다고 언급합니다. 그녀는 매운 음식을 먹고 난 후 마요네즈를 찍어 먹는 것이 매운맛을 완화하는 데 도움이 된다고 말하며, 다양한 음식과 함께 즐거운 식사 시간을 보냈다고 마무리합니다.

[14:39 ~ 16:13] and there are so many must-eat places in Namyeong-dong these days
I filmed at the 'Namyeong Chicken' last time and
It was also a must-visit place at that time
(My mayo, no!) I forgot the mayo!
(What's up with the way of speaking?) It's less spicy when dipping in it!
A bunch
(The spiciness going away...) I feel like my tongue is getting cleansed
(Only us left)
It's spicy
It's so good when dipping in the mayo
(Cleared the chicken skewers!)
The heart!
(35 chicken skewers & 3 ramyuns all cleared!)
It was very cold today, as the temperature was negative 10 degrees
(I overcame the cold with delicious food very well!) But I was able to alleviate the chill after eating this
I had a great meal once again!
